title: Quick Ethiopian Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl dish inspired by Ethiopian cuisine, combining the savory taste of taleggio cheese with the spice of the fix spice blend.

ingredients.name: Xerishe
ingredients.notes: replace with any type of cooked grain

ingredients.name: Ethiopian
ingredients.notes: Ethiopian red pepper spice or berbere

instructions: 2. Slice the taleggio cheese into thin pieces.
3. In the bowl, combine cooked xerishe, sliced cheese, Ethiopian spice, and a drizzle of olive oil (if using).
5. Optional: add a dollop of your favorite yogurt or sauce on top.
